description: Generate a REST API key for the admin user in ManageEngine OpManager (http://localhost:8060, credentials: admin/Admin@123). Then, open a terminal and use `curl` to query the OpManager REST API endpoint `http://localhost:8060/api/json/device/listDevices` with the generated API key as the `apiKey` parameter. Save the full JSON response to `~/Desktop/api_integration_test.json`.
